queries.prompt: Using the full corpus of 2022 10-K filings located at test-data/financebench/pdfs/*_2022_10K.pdf, identify the regulatory risk that appears most frequently across all filings. Provide your answer with citations to the relevant source files (file names) that support your conclusion.

Using the entire corpus located at test-data/multiformat/docx, list every GPU type recommended in the procurement memos and provide the total capital outlay for each project. Include file citations for each recommendation.
Please ingest or refresh the full source corpus located at test-data/chartqa and report on its readiness.

Using the corpus at `test-data/librispeech/LibriSpeech/test-clean`, ingest the audio data if needed, then set up a Q&A system to find any mention of the word 'medicine'. Return the answer with citations to the relevant source files or segments.
